verdict.answer_first: B: first sentence gives mechanism and outcome: "free memory automatically by tracking reachability"; A opens with broader definition: "automatic memory management".
verdict.decisiveness: B: it holds one spine, reachability -> mark/sweep -> tradeoff; A spreads into V8 internals, Go internals, table, knobs, and follow-up options.
verdict.fabrication: A has more unverifiable specifics in-answer, e.g. "targets sub-millisecond STW pauses" and "Cheney-style semi-space"; B also says "sub-millisecond" but with fewer hard specifics.
verdict.actionability: A: more concrete operational handles: "GOGC (default 100)", "GOMEMLIMIT", "sync.Pool", "pre-sizing slices", "WeakMap/WeakRef".
